content.query:
CREATE VIEW			v_ReceivingPOs
as
SELECT				ML.WHLO as Warehouse
,           		MM.ITCL as Brand
,           		MM.ITNO as ItemNumber
,           		MM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,           		ML.RVQA as Qty
,					cast(CAST(NULLIF(ML.RCDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) as [Received Date]
FROM        		M3.MPHEAD MP 	
JOIN        		M3.MPLINE ML ON MP.PUNO = ML.PUNO
JOIN        		M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
